serviceDesc.visa: Viza z'ubukerarugendo, ubucuruzi, kwiga, n'uburenganzira bwo gukora — twita kuri byose uhereye ku ntangiriro kugeza ku iherezo.
serviceDesc.accounting: Ibaruramari, gusora, na raporo z'imari ku bikorwa byihariye no ku bigo bito n'ibiringaniye.
serviceDesc.consultancy: Kwandikisha sosiyete, gutanga inama, no kugufasha mu byo gucunga ibikorwa.

intl.title: Inzira mpuzamahanga
intl.desc: Inzira zubahiriza amategeko, umutekano, no kubika amabanga.

access.title: Murashobora kutugeraho 24/7
access.desc: Saba serivisi, ohereza inyandiko, kandi ukurikirane uko bigenda igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.

multi.title: Indimi nyinshi
multi.desc: Dukora mu Cyongereza, Igishinwa (中文), Ikinyarwanda, Igifaransa, n'Icyarabu.

testimonials.quote: San Brothers banyifashije muri byose mu kubona viza yo kwiga mu Bushinwa. Sinari nkeneye no kubabaza buri munsi.
testimonials.name: Aline M.

testimonials.quote: Itsinda ry'ibaruramari ryabo ryanyemereye gusora vuba kuruta abandi twari twarakoresheje. Bikwiye buri faranga.
testimonials.name: Jean Paul K.

testimonials.quote: Mbonye umusemuzi w'Igishinwa-Ikinyarwanda mu minota mike gusa. Iyi platform ni ubutabazi ku ba mukerarugendo.
testimonials.name: Wang Wei

servicesPage.heroSubtitle: Inkunga y'umwuga muri buri ntambwe y'urugendo rwawe

translationSvc.title: Ubusemuzi
translationSvc.subtitle: Ubusemuzi bw'inyandiko, abasemuzi mu kanya, n'inkunga mu ndimi nyinshi — bihari 24/7.
translationSvc.panelText: Hura n'abasemuzi mu minota mike, saba ubusemuzi bw'inyandiko, kandi wishyure mu mutekano. Rwateguriwe ba mukerarugendo, ibigo, abanyeshuri, n'amatsinda y'amategeko.

doc.title: Ubusemuzi bw'inyandiko
doc.desc: Ubusemuzi bwemejwe ku miterere itandukanye y'inyandiko.

translationSvc.languages: Bihari mu: English · 中文 · Kinyarwanda · Français · العربية (izindi ziraza)

story.p1: San Brothers Company Ltd ni ikigo cy'umwuga gifite icyicaro mu Rwanda, i Kigali. Dufasha abantu ku giti cyabo n'ibigo gucunga inyandiko zigoye — uhereye kuri viza n'uburenganzira bwo gukora, ibaruramari, kwandikisha sosiyete, n'ubusemuzi — mu buryo bworoshye, bugezweho, kandi bwuzuye.
story.p2: Tukorera abakiriya b'Abanyarwanda, abanyeshuri mpuzamahanga, ibigo, na ba mukerarugendo. Ikipe yacu ikora mu Cyongereza, Igishinwa, Ikinyarwanda, Igifaransa, n'Icyarabu, kandi platform yacu igufasha gutanga, gukurikirana, no kurangiza akazi utigeze ujya ku biro.

professional.title: Umwuga
professional.desc: Buri murimo w'umukiriya tuwukoresha ubwitange bukwiriye — inzira zumvikana, akazi nyako, n'ibyavuye mu kazi twishingiraho.

reliable.title: Kwizerwa
reliable.desc: Igihe giteganyijwe, amakuru y'ukuri, kandi ntibikenewe ko ubaza buri saha. Ibyo tuvuga ni byo dukora.

efficient.title: Ubunyangamugayo
efficient.desc: Ibikoresho bigezweho n'akazi gakoreshwa muri digital biraduha amahirwe yo gukorera abakiriya vuba ariko nta gace dushyizemo.

partnership.title: Ubufatanye bwacu
partnership.text: San Brothers ifatanya na Best of the Best Company Ltd mu kohereza ibicuruzwa, kugura mu Bushinwa, no gusaba bourses (scholarships).

contact.haveAccountTail: kugira ngo uvugane natwe muri dashboard yawe.
contact.toast: Twakiriye ubutumwa bwawe! Tuzasubiza mu masaha 24.

faq.heroSubtitle: Ibisubizo ku bibazo bikunze kuri serivisi zacu

items.q: Ni izihe serivisi San Brothers itanga?
items.a: Dutanga inzego enye z'ingenzi: viza n'uburenganzira, ibaruramari, inama z'ubucuruzi, n'ubusemuzi. Serivisi zose zitangirwa ku biro byacu i Kigali no kuri platform yacu kuri internet.

items.q: Ngomba kwiyandikisha kugira ngo nkoreshe urubuga?
items.a: Ushobora kureba amakuru rusange utiyandikishije, ariko kugira ngo usabe serivisi, wohereze inyandiko, cyangwa uvugane n'ikipe yacu, ukeneye konti y'ubuntu.
Yego. Inyandiko n'amakuru bwite bibikwa mu buryo bwa encryption kandi bigerwaho gusa n'abakozi bashinzwe dosiye yawe. Ntidusangiza amakuru yawe abandi udatanze uruhushya rwanditse.

items.q: Bisaba igihe kingana iki kubona viza yo kwiga?
items.a: Viza nyinshi z'abanyeshuri b'Ubushinwa zifatwa mu minsi 4–10 y'akazi nyuma yo kuzitanga muri ambasade, bitewe n'igihe cy'umwaka. Gutegura inyandiko bisaba ibyumweru 1–2 mbere yo gutanga.

items.q: Ni izihe nyandiko nkenera kuri viza yo kwiga mu Bushinwa?
items.a: Ubusanzwe: pasiporo ifite agaciro, ifishi JW202/JW201, ibaruwa yo kwemererwa, amafoto agezweho, ifishi y'isuzuma ry'ubuzima, n'ikimenyetso cy'amafaranga. Tukoherereza urutonde rwihariye nyuma y'inama.
Oya. Icyemezo cya nyuma giterwa na ambasade. Icyo twemeza ni ko dosiye yawe izaba yuzuye, nyayo, kandi ufite ubuyobozi busobanutse — ibyo bigatuma amahirwe yo kwemerwa yiyongera cyane.

items.q: Mwasora muri RRA mu izina ryanjye?
items.a: Yego. Iyo udutanze uruhushya, dutegura kandi tugatanga VAT, PAYE, withholding tax, n'umusoro ku nyungu binyuze kuri portal ya RRA. Guhuza neza na RRA biri muri gahunda.
Bookkeeping itangira kuri 50,000 RWF/ukwezi ku bigo bito, kandi yiyongera bitewe n'ibikorwa n'urwego. Tugutegurira igiciro nyuma y'ikiganiro gito.

items.q: Bigenda bite kuri telefoni n'umusemuzi mu kanya?
items.a: Kuri urubuga rw'ubusemuzi uhitamo indimi ebyiri, hanyuma tukaguhuza n'umusemuzi uhari mu minota mike binyuze ku ijwi cyangwa kuri video. Wishyura kuri buri munota nyuma y'ikiganiro.
Yego. Ikinyarwanda ni rumwe mu ndimi z'ibanze, gihuzwa n'Icyongereza, Igishinwa, Igifaransa, n'Icyarabu.

items.q: Hari igihe cyo kugerageza ku buntu?
items.a: Yego. Abakiriya bashya bahabwa igihe gito cy'umusemuzi ku buntu mbere yo kwishyura. Ku busemuzi bw'inyandiko, igiciro gitangwa mbere y'akazi gatangira.

items.q: Ni ubuhe buryo bwo kwishyura mwemera?
items.a: Twemera Mobile Money (MTN, Airtel), kohereza muri banki muri RWF, no kwishyura ku makarita mpuzamahanga muri USD. Inyemezabuguzi zitangwa mu buryo bwikora.

pricing.heroSubtitle: Nta mafaranga ahishe. Wishyura icyo ukoresha gusa.
pricing.allPrices: Ibiciro byose biri muri RWF. Ku mpuzamahanga twemera kwishyura muri USD.
pricing.translationStrip: Ibiciro by'umusemuzi mu kanya n'ubusemuzi bw'inyandiko biri kuri platform yihariye —
